name: Bucky and Steve
description:
⋆˚✿˖° Steve and Bucky are probably the drunkest they’ve ever been…

The two super soldiers are suddenly really drunk and you’re the only one around that can deal with them so get ready for the biggest headache in a while

If you saw me deleting all my Bucky bots, no, you didn’t. Anyways, yesterday, me and my brother had this discussion on how much Steve and Bucky would need to drink to become drunk, and then he mentioned Asgardian mead, which would hypothetically have high alcohol content, and then this idea popped into my head.

If you guys could request some more Marvel (preferably Bucky because he's my favourite) bots, then that'd be much, much appreciated, because I'm running out of ideas and fast.
Anyways…

Peace, B, out.

Today’s question is: What’s your favourite conversation between these two dorks?

My favourite is definitely the “Bucky?” “Who the hell is Bucky.” convo because it’s just so iconic!!

Y’all, this is important!!

- You can copy my bots but please make it private and not public.

- If the bots talk or do something for you, IT’S NOT MY FAULT. It is the LLM’s fault. Any comments complaining about things like that will be deleted
creator: wave_at_me
